summary: Completed frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control iteration 6 - Model selector redesign. All 13 requested features tested and verified. Key changes: emoji capability icons replaced with Lucide React icons (Eye, Code2, Wrench, FileText, Brain, Zap), cost badges removed, two-step hover design working, PlusMenu Research mode switching functional.
passed_tests: Model selector: click opens provider-only dropdown with 6 providers (huggingface 9, ollama 11, opencode 13, opencode-go 3, openrouter 24, venice 31)
Model selector: hover over provider reveals models panel to the LEFT with model name, monospace slug, and Lucide capability icons
Model selector: capability icons are Lucide React SVGs (Eye, Code2, Wrench, FileText, Brain, Zap) - 77 green (#22c55e) for supported, 12 grey (#333) for unsupported
Model selector: NO emoji capability icons found (👁️ 💻 🔧 📁 🧠 ⚡ removed)
Model selector: NO cost badges visible ($ removed) - clean model rows with only name, slug, and capability icons
Model selector: selecting a model closes dropdown and updates label to model display name (e.g., 'Claude Opus 4.6', 'Gemini 3 Flash')
Model selector: works in Chat page, Code page, and Cowork page
PlusMenu: opens and shows all items (Add files or photos, Skills, Connectors, Research, Web search, Use style)
PlusMenu: clicking Research changes the Agent badge to Research with purple styling (#a78bfa)
PlusMenu: toggling mode button switches between Agent (blue) and Research (purple)
InputBar: persistent 'Web' and '2 skills' badges show when features are active
Cowork page: inline conversation works - click task opens conversation view with AI responses
Cowork page: Progress sidebar shows step circles (Understanding request ✓, Processing ✓, Delivering result)
Cowork page: Reply input and Queue button work correctly
Chat page: sending messages works with simulated streaming response
Code page: terminal functions correctly (echo Hello World outputs 'Hello World')
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13+ requested features tested and working. Key iteration 6 changes verified: 1) Model selector uses Lucide React icons instead of emoji (Eye, Code2, Wrench, FileText, Brain, Zap), 2) Capability icons colored green (#22c55e) for supported, grey (#333) for unsupported, 3) Cost badges completely removed from model selector, 4) Two-step hover design: providers panel (right) always visible when open, models panel (left) appears on hover, 5) PlusMenu Research option changes InputBar mode badge to Research with purple styling. All APIs remain MOCKED via Zustand store.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), cancelJob (state update), approveRequest/rejectRequest (state update), Cowork AI responses (simulated with setTimeout delay)
